tasks.subject: Task 1: Drop Prometheus counter claim from docs + spec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stop false advertising. Replace counter promise with UNSTASH_GCS_ORPHAN log-prefix.

**Files:** apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md, docs/daemon_guide.md, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-19-stash-unstash-gcs-design.md

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md","docs/daemon_guide.md","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-19-stash-unstash-gcs-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git -C 'C:/Users/randr/Documents/Workspaces/RAG-HP-PUB' grep -nE 'unstash_gcs_orphan_total' -- apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md docs/daemon_guide.md","acceptanceCriteria":["No unstash_gcs_orphan_total","UNSTASH_GCS_ORPHAN prefix mentioned","Amendment 2026-05-19 section in original spec"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add tarfile.extractall(filter="data")
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PEP 706 filter for CVE-2007-4559 + Python 3.14 compat. Regression test.

**Files:** crawler_manager.py:2142, test_crawler_manager_stash.py

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v -k tar_filter","acceptanceCriteria":["filter='data' applied","test rejects ../escape.txt","EXTRACT_FAILED 502"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wrap stash_crawl pre-flight in fail-open try/except
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Measurement exception logs warning + proceeds. Mirror archive_crawl pattern.


tasks.subject: Task 4: Rewrite orphan log line to UNSTASH_GCS_ORPHAN prefix
tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 5: Close stash_crawl TOCTOU race
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Post-lock fresh Redis read + re-validate. Release lock + 409 on mismatch.

**Files:** crawler_manager.py (stash_crawl after _acquire_ownership_lock), test_crawler_manager_stash.py

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v -k 'toctou and stash'","acceptanceCriteria":["Fresh get_json after lock","Re-validate status + stashed_at","Lock released on mismatch","Test asserts 409 ALREADY_STASHED + eval called"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Close unstash_crawl TOCTOU race
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Symmetric to T5. Verify stashed_at still populated.

**Files:** crawler_manager.py (unstash_crawl after _acquire_ownership_lock), test_crawler_manager_stash.py

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v -k 'toctou and unstash'","acceptanceCriteria":["Fresh get_json after lock","stashed_at still populated check","Lock released on mismatch","Test asserts 409 NOT_STASHED + eval called"]}
```
